mapper.select:
SELECT id, role_name as roleName, remark FROM MIS_ROLE WHERE 1=1
AND role_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, role_name as roleName, remark FROM MIS_ROLE WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MIS_ROLE (id, role_name, remark) VALUES (#{id}, #{roleName}, #{remark})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM MIS_ROLE WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MIS_ROLE_PERMISSION WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MIS_USER_ROLE ur JOIN MIS_USER u ON ur.user_id = u.id WHERE ur.role_id = #{roleId}

SELECT r.id, r.role_name as roleName, r.remark, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MIS_ROLE_PERMISSION WHERE role_id = r.id) as permissionCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MIS_USER_ROLE ur JOIN MIS_USER u ON ur.user_id = u.id WHERE ur.role_id = r.id) as userCount FROM MIS_ROLE r WHERE 1=1
AND r.role_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY r.id ASC
LIMIT #{start}, #{length}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MIS_ROLE r WHERE 1=1
AND r.role_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')

SELECT p.id, p.permission_code as permissionCode, p.module_id as moduleId, p.action_id as actionId, m.module_name as moduleName, a.action_name as actionName FROM MIS_PERMISSION p LEFT JOIN MIS_MODULE m ON p.module_id = m.id LEFT JOIN MIS_ACTION a ON p.action_id = a.id WHERE p.permission_code != 'ROOT' ORDER BY p.id ASC
SELECT id, role_name as roleName FROM MIS_ROLE ORDER BY id ASC
